steps.title: Read the relevant counts from the table
steps.content: From the table, the number of brown regular-length pants is 3 and the total number of regular-length pants is 12.

steps.title: Compute the conditional probability
steps.content:
The probability of brown given regular is $\frac{\text{brown regular}}{\text{total regular}} = \frac{3}{12}$. Simplify by dividing numerator and denominator by 3: $$\frac{3}{12} = \frac{1}{4}$$
The answer is 1/4.

Equivalent forms accepted: 1/4, 0.25.
